task: Go to the URL and complete the form with non-Latin characters by filling in all required fields and submitting. If needed, create a file. Validate that the form was filled and submitted successfully. https://browser-use.github.io/stress-tests/challenges/non-latin-form.html
graderReasoning: The agent successfully navigated to the provided URL, which presented a form with non-Latin characters (Arabic) and a right-to-left layout. The agent correctly identified all required fields: Email, Country, Date of Birth, Preferred Contact Method, and Document Upload. It then proceeded to create a test file with non-Latin characters using a bash command. Subsequently, the agent filled in all the form fields, including selecting a country and preferred contact method using non-Latin text, and successfully uploaded the created document. Finally, the agent submitted the form and validated its successful submission by identifying the confirmation message on the page. The agent's reasoning was clear and methodical throughout the process, and all tools were used effectively.
